Sound.comment: Maybe the so realistic church environment creates a sense of smell and sound that is characteristic to this environment.

Emotional Reinforcement.comment: I think there might be an emotion of calmness and presence.

visualElements.comment: One chair represents a percentage of catholics, acting as a unit.

contextualAttributes.comment: Chair stacks horizontally aligned one next to the other in the physical space.

visualElements.comment: The surrounding church setting provides contextual support for the metaphor while also reinforcing the data theme through its association with the subject matter (religion).
